Name: Lutheran Camp
Interesting Camp Sessions:
Experience the awesomeness of LVR during these week-long sessions. Each day the campers play in God’s creation with activities like archery, tomahawks, rock climbing, fishing, giant swing, crafts, and many other camp activities. Horse rides are $15 extra each, up to two rides for the week and payable upon arrival to camp.

Campers have demonstrations in grooming, haltering, leading, saddling & riding styles as well as hands on experience, knowledge of horse breeds, equipment, along with the work and joys involved in owning a horse. Campers are instructed to wear long pants & tennis shoes or boots.

Name: YMCA Camp Chief Ouray (Granby)
Weeks Run: June 5-August 9, one week and two week sessions, along with sessions for older kids
Cost Per Week:
$481.95 mini camp
$1132 traditional one week camp
$2324 traditional two week camp
Interesting Camp Sessions: Each week has a different theme
Notes:
TRADITIONAL CAMP (Sun – Sat)
Campers live in cabins of up to 10 campers and 2 staff members. This community living builds a campers ability to group problem solve, make group decisions, and becomes the core of their experience. The activities at camp consist of a mix between cabin activities including a camp out night under the stars, group activities of campers of similar ages, and freedom of choice activities (FOCA) which campers choose. This mixture of activities allows for bonding with cabin mates and the ability to branch out to new friends of all ages.

Building on the half-week program, Aspen Camp gives younger campers a close experience of what traditional camp is like.
